nodes.label: Mandelbrot CPU Benchmark
nodes.rationale: Jarvis RTOS achieves 83% of native Linux performance on KVM. The 35ms vs 29ms gap is explained by: (1) -mgeneral-regs-only prevents SIMD use while Linux uses SSE/AVX, (2) QEMU-KVM VM-exit overhead from PIT interrupts every 1ms, (3) Higher TLB/memory latency from emulated hardware. Benchmark is integer-based so comparison is fair.
